title: NoCopyrightSounds music NCS
description: adds ncs tracks into the game!
body:
## Minecraft NCS mod

**ever wanted NCS in minecraft 1.20.1? now you have it!**


- **this mod adds total of 35 most popular and some of my personal favourite NCS tracks**
- Free to use in any modpack enjoy (:



<details>
<summary>List of tracks</summary>

1. - DEAF KEV - Invincible
1. - Cartoon, Jéja - On & On
1. - Cartoon, Jéja - C U Again
1. - Cartoon, Jéja - Why We Lose
1. - Desmeon - Hellcat
1. - K391 - Earth
1. - Electro-Light - Symbolism
1. - Elektromania - Sky High
1. - Warryio - Mortals
1. - Janji - Heroes Tonight
1. - Robin Hustin x TobiMorrow - Light It Up
1. - JJD - Adventure
1. - Desmeon - Back From The Dead
1. - Jim Yosef - Firefly
1. - Domastic - Weird Dream
1. - Spektrem - Shine
1. - Lost Sky - Where We Started
1. - Diamond Eyes - Everything
1. - Clarx - H.A.Y.
1. - Dirty Palm - Oblivion
1. - Clarx - Zig Zag
1. - Alex Skrindo - Jumbo
1. - Lensko - Cetus
1. - Different Heaven & EH!DE - My Heart
1. - Different Heaven - Safe & Sound
1. - Jim Yosef, Anna Yvette - Linked
1. - Jordan Schor, Nathan Brumley - Cosmic
1. - Lost Sky - Dreams 
1. - Maestro Chives, Egzod, Neoni - Royalty
1. - Unknown Brain, Chris Linton - Superhero 
1. - Whales, Jo. Cohen - We Are

1. - Dirty Palm, LexBlaze - Freakshow

1. - Different Heaven - Far Away


</details>
